S.FORM: nisiya wa'is kin sobae:oeh Sina:iS Si'al'oetoeh ila.
nisiya wa'is kin sobae:oeh Sina:iS Si'al'oetoeh ila.
S.PHON: nis~θija waʔis~θ kin s~θoβæ:œh ʃina:iʃ ʃiʔalʔœtœh ila.
S.TRANSL: He has so much strength that he broke the rope.
